Are you sure you want to mark the task as complete? This will trigger your solution to be graded and you won't be able to make any further corrections. If so, include "task_complete": true in your JSON response again.

action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "I have successfully completed the task. The TCC ISO has been created at /tmp/tcc.iso with a size of 836K. The ISO contains:
1. The TCC binary at bin/tcc
2. All necessary TCC headers in lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/tcc/include/
3. Runtime libraries (libtcc1.a, bcheck.o, etc.)
4. Documentation and examples in share/doc/tcc/

The user can now run their QEMU command with -cdrom /tmp/tcc.iso and have a fully functional TCC compiler available inside the virtual machine. The ISO was created using genisoimage with proper Rock Ridge and Joliet extensions for compatibility.",
  "plan": "The task is definitively complete. The user requested to compile TCC and put it on an ISO attached to CDROM for use in QEMU, and this has been accomplished successfully.",
  "commands": [],
  "task_complete": true
}
